purpose: Single source of truth for moving the URAI ecosystem from static/demo surfaces to production-grade connected systems without overclaiming.
rules: LifeLoggerAI/UrAi is the canonical product spine.
No external repo may be called production until deploy, smoke, rollback, monitoring, and privacy evidence are recorded.
Sensitive systems must depend on LifeLoggerAI/urai-privacy before V1 use.
Roadmap-only systems may be visible only as honest gated surfaces, never as live claims.
All launch gates require evidence, not vibes.

spineRepos.name: LifeLoggerAI/UrAi
spineRepos.role: canonical public product and integration shell

spineRepos.name: LifeLoggerAI/urai-privacy
spineRepos.role: privacy, consent, export, delete, retention, legal release gate

spineRepos.name: LifeLoggerAI/urai-admin
spineRepos.role: operator control plane and audit surface

spineRepos.name: LifeLoggerAI/urai-jobs
spineRepos.role: async execution, retry, idempotency, scheduled work

spineRepos.name: LifeLoggerAI/urai-content
spineRepos.role: canonical content templates and output definitions

spineRepos.name: LifeLoggerAI/urai-spatial
spineRepos.role: spatial/Life Map feature source to port into canonical app after privacy proof

spineRepos.name: LifeLoggerAI/urai-analytics
spineRepos.role: event ingestion and aggregate insight, disabled until privacy proof

spineRepos.name: LifeLoggerAI/urai-communications
spineRepos.role: opt-in outbound/inbound messaging and notification layer

spineRepos.name: LifeLoggerAI/urai-storytime
spineRepos.role: narrative/session engine, blocked until safety and privacy proof

acceptanceCriteria: npm ci succeeds on Node 20
npm run preflight succeeds
npm run launch:check succeeds
production deployment SHA is recorded
consent categories are versioned and auditable
export flow produces a user-owned archive
delete flow purges Firestore and Storage paths for the requesting user
admin access is audited
legal signoff date and policy version are recorded
staging deploy uses isolated Firebase/project targets
staging smoke covers root, health, auth, privacy, admin, and jobs routes
release candidate SHA is recorded
rollback SHA is recorded
superadmin bootstrap is documented and proven
admin URL returns 200 for authorized users and rejects unauthorized users
operator actions write audit records
monitoring and rollback evidence are recorded
a real job can be submitted, processed, retried, and completed
idempotency key prevents duplicate execution
failed job path is visible in admin
monitoring alert fires on forced failure
demo content is separated from private/user content
provider configuration is recorded without secrets
exports/downloads are privacy gated
content contracts are consumed by canonical app or jobs layer
spatial branch/source is ported into LifeLoggerAI/UrAi or documented as deferred
desktop/mobile fallbacks are intact
WebXR entry is shown only after real immersive-vr support detection
headset proof is recorded before any VR claim
event taxonomy is approved
PII and sensitive signals are excluded or explicitly consented
durable storage and dashboard proof are recorded
delete/export implications are documented and tested
provider staging proof is recorded
user opt-in and opt-out are enforced
templates are versioned
admin send path is audited
marketing surface matches current product truth
waitlist/contact form has privacy notice
no unproven production, VR, AI, health, or automation claims remain
rollback and monitoring evidence are recorded if called production
